hero.caption: Point-of-care diagnostics
hero.title: Igloo Pro System
hero.description: Lab values from capillary blood, analysed right in your practice – in 3 to 15 minutes. A compact immunofluorescence system for diagnostics at the point of care.

intro.caption: The system
intro.title: Lab Quality in Handheld Format
intro.text1: The Igloo Pro Reader brings quantitative lab diagnostics to the point of care. Validated immunofluorescence technology delivers results you can rely on.
intro.text2: Whether in the practice, the clinic, or mobile – the Igloo Pro provides the values you need to decide, without the detour through an external lab.

methods.title: Versatile Methods
methods.description: Supports diverse test procedures for maximum flexibility.

battery.title: Long Battery Life
battery.description: Powerful battery for all-day mobile use.

connectivity.title: Full Connectivity
connectivity.description: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and USB for seamless data transfer.

precision.title: Validated Precision
precision.description: Validated accuracy comparable to large laboratory devices.

specs.caption: Technology
specs.title: Technical Data
specs.samples_value: Whole blood, Serum, Plasma, Capillary blood

parameters.title: Available Parameters
parameters.disclaimer: The test portfolio is constantly expanding. Please contact us for the current list.

cta_bottom.caption: Demo & advice
cta_bottom.title: See the Igloo Pro in your practice.
cta_bottom.description: Request a no-obligation quote or download the datasheet. We will get back to you within one business day.

seo.title: IglooPro POC Reader: Specs & Technology
seo.description: IglooPro POC reader delivers lab values chairside in 3–15 min from capillary blood: vitamin D, CRP, HbA1c, TSH and more. Immunofluorescence, CV < 5 %, 600 g.
